must_detect.matched_text:
Incident Report — Cybersecurity Event, Ravantee Systems Limited (Kaveri Stock Exchange code: RSL)
On 28-May-2026 at 03:14 IST, the SOC identified anomalous outbound traffic from the Koraval Layout office in Bendaru, Karnataka, affecting a file server hosting employee records and IR working papers; personal data as defined under the DPDPA may be implicated.
Linkable cluster — Mr. Shreyas Kulkarni, age 34 (DOB 1992-11-05), Senior Network Analyst at Ravantee Systems Limited, used device RSL-NT-0142 (Lenvon T14), signed in via session rid-2026-05-28-BNR-042 from geo-tag “Bendaru-South,” corporate email shreyas.kulkarni@ravantee.example.in, internal payroll account RSL-PAY-99384.
Obfuscated identifiers in the same folder for this user included Aadhaar: 8 7 1 9  6 6 2 0  4 4 5 0 (masked copy), PAN: A J Z P K 1 2 3 4 Q (partially redacted), and badge ID EMP-E-00931; note that these were not transmitted outside the network per current logs.
The Wi‑Fi AP MAC was not 00:00:00:00:00:00 (example only); the actual AP tag ap-2F-17 is a generic asset label and is not personally identifying by itself.
UPSI exposure risk — the server path \\rsl-ir\Q4\Pravaha\ contained Q4_draft.xlsx with unannounced order book and margin guidance for the Pravaha Solar Inverter line; under the Securities Oversight Board of India PIT Regulations this is unpublished price-sensitive information for a listed issuer.
Trading window closure for designated persons was initiated at 09:30 IST and the insider list was refreshed; queries to compliance may be addressed to cs.compliance@ravantee.example.in and dpo@ravantee.example.in.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
